title: Tensor Parallelism
description: Split individual weight matrices across GPUs — column-linear, row-linear, and how tensor parallelism works inside a transformer block.
tags: Column-Linear and Row-Linear: The Two Sharding Strategies
Tensor Parallelism in a Transformer Block
Communication Costs and Scaling Limits of Tensor Parallelism

notebooks.title: Column-Parallel and Row-Parallel Linear Layers from Scratch
notebooks.objective: Implement the two fundamental building blocks of tensor parallelism — column-parallel and row-parallel linear layers — and verify they produce mathematically identical results to standard matrix multiplication.

notebooks.title: Megatron-Style Tensor-Parallel MLP Block
notebooks.objective: Build a complete Megatron-LM style tensor-parallel MLP block combining column-parallel and row-parallel layers, with residual connections and LayerNorm, verifying only one allreduce is needed per MLP block.

notebooks.title: Tensor-Parallel Multi-Head Attention and Full Transformer Layer
notebooks.objective: Implement tensor-parallel multi-head self-attention by partitioning heads across GPUs, then build a complete tensor-parallel transformer layer with exactly two allreduce operations.

curator.name: Dr. Rajat Dandekar
curator.title: Course Instructor
curator.bio: Dr. Rajat Dandekar is a researcher and educator specializing in AI/ML, with a passion for making complex concepts accessible through intuitive explanations and hands-on learning.
